title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Join Google's world-class engineering team to build and scale products used by billions of people. You will work on complex distributed systems and contribute to technical decisions that shape Google's infrastructure.
responsibilities: Design, develop, test, deploy, and maintain software solutions
Write technical specifications and design documents
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define product requirements
Mentor junior engineers and conduct code reviews
Drive technical decisions and architectural improvements
requirements: 5+ years of software engineering experience
Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science or related field
Strong proficiency in one or more programming languages (Python, Java, Go, C++)
Experience with distributed systems and cloud infrastructure
Excellent problem-solving and communication skills

title: React Frontend Engineer
description: Meta is looking for a talented Frontend Engineer to help build the next generation of social experiences. You'll work closely with product designers and backend engineers to deliver high-quality user interfaces.
responsibilities: Build and maintain high-performance React web applications
Collaborate with designers to implement pixel-perfect UIs
Optimize applications for maximum performance and scalability
Participate in design and code reviews
Contribute to open-source projects and internal libraries
requirements: 3+ years of frontend development experience
Expert knowledge of React, JavaScript (ES6+), and CSS
Experience with GraphQL and REST APIs
Understanding of web accessibility standards
Familiarity with testing frameworks (Jest, React Testing Library)

title: Backend Engineer - Payments
description: Stripe processes hundreds of billions of dollars a year for millions of businesses. As a Backend Engineer on the Payments team, you'll help build the financial infrastructure that powers the internet economy.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain APIs that handle payment transactions at scale
Build fraud detection and risk management systems
Design fault-tolerant, highly available backend services
Work with financial partners and regulatory bodies
Improve system observability through monitoring and alerting
requirements: 4+ years of backend engineering experience
Experience with distributed systems and microservices
Proficiency in Ruby, Go, or Java
Knowledge of database design and optimization
Understanding of financial systems and payment processing

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: At Airbnb, we believe in a world where anyone can belong anywhere. As a Full Stack Engineer, you'll work on features that help millions of travelers find their perfect stay and empower hosts around the world.
responsibilities: Build full-stack features across web and mobile platforms
Develop RESTful APIs and frontend interfaces
Collaborate with product and design teams
Write comprehensive tests and documentation
Participate in on-call rotations
requirements: 3+ years of full-stack development experience
Proficiency in React or similar frontend frameworks
Experience with Ruby on Rails or Node.js
Solid understanding of SQL and NoSQL databases
Strong communication and teamwork skills

title: Senior Data Engineer
description: Netflix is looking for a Senior Data Engineer to join our data platform team. You'll build the infrastructure that powers data-driven decision making across the company and enables personalization at scale.
responsibilities: Design and build large-scale data pipelines
Develop and maintain data models and schemas
Collaborate with data scientists and analysts
Ensure data quality, integrity, and reliability
Optimize query performance and data storage costs
requirements: 5+ years of data engineering experience
Proficiency in Python, Scala, or Java
Experience with Apache Spark and distributed processing
Strong SQL skills and knowledge of data warehousing
Experience with cloud data platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)

title: Product Designer
description: Shopify empowers over a million businesses worldwide. As a Product Designer, you'll craft beautiful, intuitive experiences that help merchants grow their businesses and make commerce better for everyone.
responsibilities: Lead end-to-end design processes from ideation to launch
Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs
Conduct user research and usability testing
Collaborate with engineers to ensure high-quality implementation
Contribute to Shopify's design system
requirements: 4+ years of product design experience
Proficiency in Figma and design tools
Strong portfolio demonstrating UX problem-solving
Experience with user research methods
Ability to communicate design decisions clearly

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Spotify's mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity. As an ML Engineer, you'll build recommendation algorithms and personalization systems that help 500M+ users discover music they love.
responsibilities: Design and deploy machine learning models at scale
Build features for music recommendation and discovery
Collaborate with research scientists and product teams
Monitor model performance and implement improvements
Write production-quality code for ML pipelines
requirements: 3+ years of machine learning engineering experience
Proficiency in Python and ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch)
Experience with large-scale recommendation systems
Strong understanding of statistics and ML algorithms
Experience with MLOps and model deployment

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Slack is where work happens. As a DevOps Engineer, you'll build and maintain the infrastructure that powers real-time communication for millions of teams around the world.
responsibilities: Design and implement CI/CD pipelines
Manage cloud infrastructure on AWS and GCP
Automate deployment and operational tasks
Monitor system health and respond to incidents
Collaborate with engineering teams to improve reliability
requirements: 3+ years of DevOps or SRE experience
Strong experience with AWS or GCP
Proficiency in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Pulumi)
Experience with container orchestration (Kubernetes)
Knowledge of monitoring and observability tools

title: iOS Engineer
description: Build the next generation of Twitter for iOS. You'll work on features used by hundreds of millions of people daily, tackling challenges in performance, reliability, and user experience.
responsibilities: Develop new features for the Twitter iOS app
Write clean, maintainable Swift code
Optimize app performance and battery usage
Collaborate with backend and design teams
Participate in code reviews and mentoring
requirements: 4+ years of iOS development experience
Expert knowledge of Swift and SwiftUI
Experience with Combine or RxSwift
Understanding of iOS design patterns (MVVM, Clean Architecture)
App Store release experience

title: Cloud Solutions Architect
description: Microsoft Azure is the backbone of enterprise cloud computing. As a Cloud Solutions Architect, you'll help customers design and implement scalable, secure cloud architectures on Azure.
responsibilities: Design enterprise-grade cloud architectures on Azure
Consult with customers on cloud adoption and migration
Develop reference architectures and best practices
Lead technical workshops and proof-of-concept projects
Stay up-to-date with Azure services and capabilities
requirements: 6+ years of cloud or infrastructure experience
Azure Solutions Architect certification (preferred)
Deep knowledge of Azure services (compute, networking, storage)
Experience with hybrid cloud environments
Strong consulting and presentation skills

title: Android Engineer
description: Uber connects millions of riders and drivers every day. As an Android Engineer, you'll build and optimize the Uber Driver and Rider apps that power mobility in 70+ countries.
responsibilities: Build and ship new features on the Uber Android apps
Write robust, testable Kotlin code
Optimize app performance and reduce crash rates
Work with real-time mapping and location systems
Conduct technical interviews and mentoring
requirements: 4+ years of Android development experience
Expert knowledge of Kotlin and Android SDK
Experience with Jetpack Compose
Understanding of concurrency and reactive programming
Experience with large-scale production apps

title: UX Researcher
description: Figma is building tools for the future of design. As a UX Researcher, you'll uncover insights about how designers and developers work, helping shape the direction of our products.
responsibilities: Plan and execute qualitative and quantitative research studies
Conduct user interviews, surveys, and usability tests
Synthesize findings and present actionable insights
Partner with product designers and PMs
Build and maintain research repository
requirements: 3+ years of UX research experience
Proficiency in mixed-methods research
Experience with research tools (UserTesting, Maze, Dovetail)
Strong analytical and storytelling skills
Background in design tools or creative software preferred

title: Blockchain Engineer
description: Coinbase is building the financial system of the future. As a Blockchain Engineer, you'll work on the core infrastructure for cryptocurrency trading, custody, and compliance.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain blockchain integrations
Build secure wallet and transaction systems
Work with smart contracts and DeFi protocols
Ensure regulatory compliance for crypto operations
Contribute to open-source blockchain projects
requirements: 3+ years of software engineering experience
Understanding of blockchain fundamentals (Bitcoin, Ethereum)
Experience with smart contracts (Solidity preferred)
Proficiency in Go, Rust, or Python
Knowledge of cryptography and security best practices

title: Salesforce Developer
description: Salesforce is the world's #1 CRM platform. As a Salesforce Developer, you'll build custom applications and integrations that help enterprise customers streamline their business processes.
responsibilities: Develop custom Salesforce applications using Apex and LWC
Build integrations between Salesforce and third-party systems
Design workflows, process builders, and automation rules
Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues
Collaborate with business analysts to gather requirements
requirements: 3+ years of Salesforce development experience
Salesforce Platform Developer I certification
Proficiency in Apex, SOQL, and Lightning Web Components
Experience with Salesforce APIs and integrations
Strong understanding of Salesforce data model

title: Marketing Data Analyst
description: HubSpot helps thousands of companies grow better. As a Marketing Data Analyst, you'll use data to optimize our marketing campaigns, understand customer behavior, and drive business growth.
responsibilities: Analyze marketing campaign performance and attribution
Build dashboards and reports for stakeholders
Develop predictive models for lead scoring and churn
Collaborate with marketing and sales teams
Identify growth opportunities through data insights
requirements: 2+ years of data analytics or marketing analytics experience
Proficiency in SQL and Python or R
Experience with BI tools (Tableau, Looker, or Power BI)
Understanding of digital marketing channels and metrics
Strong communication and presentation skills

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description: Atlassian builds tools for teams to collaborate and ship great software. As an SRE, you'll ensure the reliability, availability, and performance of Jira, Confluence, and other Atlassian products.
responsibilities: Own reliability of critical Atlassian services
Build and improve observability, alerting, and monitoring
Lead incident response and post-mortems
Automate toil and improve operational efficiency
Partner with engineering teams on reliability improvements
requirements: 4+ years of SRE or operations engineering experience
Strong coding skills in Python, Go, or Java
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure)
Knowledge of observability tools (Datadog, Grafana)
Experience with Kubernetes and container orchestration

title: Product Manager
description: Zoom is redefining how the world communicates. As a Product Manager, you'll drive the vision and execution of features that help millions of users collaborate in an increasingly hybrid world.
responsibilities: Define product vision, strategy, and roadmap
Gather and prioritize product requirements
Work closely with engineering, design, and marketing teams
Analyze product metrics and user feedback
Launch features and measure their impact
requirements: 4+ years of product management experience
Experience with B2B SaaS products
Strong analytical skills and data-driven decision making
Excellent communication and stakeholder management
Technical background or ability to work closely with engineers

title: Developer Advocate
description: GitHub is where the world builds software. As a Developer Advocate, you'll represent GitHub in the developer community, creating content and experiences that inspire developers to build amazing things.
responsibilities: Create technical content (blogs, videos, demos, talks)
Represent GitHub at conferences and events
Gather developer feedback to influence product direction
Build relationships with open-source communities
Collaborate with product and marketing teams
requirements: 3+ years of software development experience
Experience in developer relations or technical content creation
Strong public speaking and writing skills
Active participation in developer communities
Passion for open-source and developer tools

title: Solutions Engineer
description: Twilio powers communications for the world's leading companies. As a Solutions Engineer, you'll help prospects and customers design and implement communications solutions using Twilio's APIs.
responsibilities: Conduct technical discovery with customers
Build proof-of-concept applications using Twilio APIs
Present technical solutions to engineering and executive audiences
Support the sales process with technical expertise
Create and maintain technical documentation
requirements: 3+ years of software development or solutions engineering
Proficiency in at least one language (Python, Node.js, Java)
Experience with REST APIs and webhooks
Strong communication and presentation skills
Ability to quickly learn new technologies

title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: Notion is the all-in-one workspace for notes, docs, and project management. As a Junior Frontend Developer, you'll work alongside senior engineers to build features that help teams work better together.
responsibilities: Build UI components and features in React
Fix bugs and improve performance
Write unit and integration tests
Participate in code reviews
Contribute to technical discussions and planning
requirements: 1+ years of frontend development experience
Solid understanding of React and JavaScript
Familiarity with TypeScript
Understanding of CSS and responsive design
Eagerness to learn and grow

title: Next.js Engineer
description: Vercel is the platform for frontend developers. As a Next.js Engineer, you'll work on the framework and tooling that millions of developers rely on to build fast, scalable web applications.
responsibilities: Contribute to Next.js core framework development
Improve Developer Experience (DX) and tooling
Build and maintain Vercel platform features
Write comprehensive tests and documentation
Engage with the open-source community
requirements: 3+ years of JavaScript or TypeScript experience
Deep understanding of Next.js and React
Experience with server-side rendering and edge computing
Open-source contribution experience preferred
Passion for developer experience and web performance

title: Security Engineer
description: Datadog helps organizations monitor their entire technology stack. As a Security Engineer, you'll protect Datadog's platform and help our customers secure their environments.
responsibilities: Design and implement security controls for Datadog's platform
Conduct threat modeling and security reviews
Respond to security incidents and vulnerabilities
Build security automation and tooling
Collaborate with engineering teams on secure-by-default practices
requirements: 4+ years of security engineering experience
Experience with cloud security (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
Knowledge of security frameworks (SOC 2, ISO 27001)
Proficiency in Python or Go for security tooling
Experience with penetration testing or vulnerability research
